MIME-Version: 1.0
From: Start Daily <microsoft.start@email2.microsoft.com>
To: emil.skogsund@gmail.com
Date: Thu, 11 Apr 2024 15:30:35 -0700
Subject: OJ Simpson, former football star acquitted of murder, dies at 76
Message-ID: <6618648f.0c0a0220.1e09e.3d6dSMTPIN_ADDED_BROKEN@mx.google.com>
Content-Type: text/html; charset="utf-8"

<!DOCTYPE html><html lang="en-us"><head><meta charset="utf-8"><meta content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1" name="viewport"><title>Start Daily</title></head><body bgcolor="#f0f0f0"><table align="center" bgcolor="#f0f0f0" border="0" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" dir="left" style="font-family:Segoe UI,-apple-system,helvetica Neue,Helvetica,Lucida Grande,Arial,Verdana,sans-serif" width="100%">
        <tr><td><table align="center" cellpadding="0" cellspacing="0" height="52" style="background-color:#fff;box-shadow:0 3px 0 transparent" width="600"><tr><td align="left" style="padding:0;min-width:150px;min-height:50px;vertical-align:middle"><a href="https://mucp.api.account.microsoft.com/m/v2/c?r=AIAADXOGAZPA576PW5AASH3KR2OWNOFIL6AL4DPCSW6QQ3G5RPCXSKN37FQ63EPJ2QMHTGTHGSOZ6TSSE2IUK26U3D7T6MSOE6IXMSP3IJ6FZEPS7C32CHPMQ73TN5TARMWLUWU6EBDP6MROWNPD4XVQQXS3H3OIEWJ2PCYQDCYLGFSICTIA3FNI&d=AIAADYM22H7UXABFSY3SLBUAXG2MX5P4ZSBM3SZUBBBCLFMTPXQAV62WCNLVXZWFLACC5S4K2CV2AZDY7JGOYNQVGH37SLP42JVUQLZCIMUJAZOCALTAUTI4GZJVUI7MRIJDAMP3C6UNOJL2FWVGYIG2JZ6CQQ7YFGAX4TEHVTPEZMZFZ7IZ2HDPLT3VYBWHV7Y2TLZ72ZPQHQTKME&" id="NewHeaderMicrosoftStartImg" style="border:none" target="_blank"><img alt="MSN" height="45" src="https://www.bing.com/th?id=OEP.34427CBFF3D4D1C8119FED16222B4DEE&pid=BEmail" style="border:none;text-align:center" width="150"></a></td></tr></table></td></tr>
